Jenkins, doll and I think helot- kinda forgot tho😭

Pointers on how to play tank alva team? 

Began playing traphase yesterday and I'm confused if I should hard mulligan for pandia ult, when to start using Alva cards to DPS and that stuff.
I think you use pandia charge card to snipe anyone who might be a threat then just let everyone else except alva die
Snipe with alva 3 cost*
Depends on a lot of situations honestly
If you play against aggro stuff you save 3 cost card from alva + 2 cost card from pandia and mulligan the rest except for alva wheel or posse
If you play against one shot team such as helot you want to either setup your one shot and wait that he use his wheel to kill them so his setup get fked up
Or you put analysis of death wheel on front depending on how your luck goes
Stuff like paralysis team you make sure to discard every alva cards
You want to get nobleman staff first hand, pandia cards, and dispel card from doll
You can combo pandia 2 cost + exalt + 0 cost on an enemy
You use the posse that give a select strike card on alva + wheel
It should do 91 dmg and with the 0 cost card it's 113 dmg
If it's still not enough you still have pandia 1 cost card that deal 26 dmg after 3 ampli from exalt
The total cost 5 arithmetica ( counting doll cleanse )
Alot of thought goes into the team huh <:thumbsup:1356086340298473574>
Yeah and that's why i'm pissed off when i'm against stuff like paralysis comp or helot comp
Helot comp is just use wheel, wait alienus, nautila exalt, helot charge spam, helot exalt + doresain wheel = win
If there is analysis of death they get shafted
Because their team sucks

I tried helot team and it was fun for 3-4 rounds 
Then it just got boring doing the same thing
As for paralysis it's just draw paralysis, spam paralysis cards
I like teams where you have more options than just a single otk
Honestly super annoying to deal with especially before you draw noble man staff <:takenotes:1357186646294138890>

Helot is mostly carrying me back to 3,000+
my helot team is kind of versatile tho, it could be helot sweep or gdoll sweep, celes wheel for cleanse and survivability, +3 arith wheel for burst, hand limit wheel for no reason...
The revive posse for sniping teams, entwine posse hard counters death cat wheel and the entwine wheel..

My comp still works without doresein wheel somehow, and btw for gdoll sweep, it only works if artisan dupes her 3 cost card, strengthen it and it's 30 damage and 38? With winkle vulnerable, it's good enough if the enemy is heavily focused on helot, but most of the time helot sweeps, doll serves as extra damage.

I guess other much aggressive helot comps could maybe beat it probably

Trust me, that 30 damage is very important, especially for those pandia teams, it could also transition to a aoe heal and just wipe their team with buffed cards from either gdoll or helot if they're still alive
But yeah, i definitely need to change teams, it's very boring...
I mean...
